Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}Help yourself to the snacks as well, if you'd like.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Today, I wanted to show my thanks for your hard work, as well as check in to see how you're doing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Ever since you joined us, you've been taking on a lot of responsibility as leader of our group.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Have you been running into any trouble? If you have, please, don't be afraid to let me know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I have to say, I'm always inspired by the way you remain calm no matter the situation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 3 25 25}I apologize for putting so much pressure on you. I'll do whatever I can to help.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}I have to say, I am grateful that you agreed to take on the leadership role.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}And I want you to know that you're doing an excellent job. Akihiko was right about you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}I just thought that this time we have might be a good opportunity to talk things over.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}But I suppose it's only natural for you to have your own problems. For today, let's enjoy the refreshments.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Your cup is empty... Let's pour you another.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru and I enjoyed tea together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}...It's late. We ended up spending a lot of time here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 13 4 1 5}I'm glad we had the chance to talk today. I'd like to invite you again when the opportunity arises.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}It feels nice, being able to pour tea for someone else like this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I'm supposed to be the host, and yet here I am thinking about myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}How about you, then? Are you having a good time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Chamomile is known for its relaxing properties, so maybe that's taking its effect on you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 3 25 25}I... was actually a bit worried that I might be putting you off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Apparently, the popular opinion is that I'm difficult to approach...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Sorry about that. Try to relax, if you can...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Then again, if it were that easy, it wouldn't be a problem, would it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 3 25 25}Apparently, the popular opinion is that I'm difficult to approach...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}My apologies. Let me take care of that for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Heh, I'm glad you aren't afraid to speak up when you want something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Apparently, the popular opinion is that I'm difficult to approach...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Hm? We're running low on snacks. I'll have to ask my staff to—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Oh, never mind. Here, let me pour you another cup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I drank herbal tea with Mitsuru as[n]we discussed our favorite snacks...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}All right, I think that's enough for now. We should start cleaning up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}{f 5 13 4 1 5}I'd like to invite you for this again, if time allows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}But for now, let's head back to our rooms.[n]{f 1 1}
